pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.0 to align with the JDK 21 migration and access newer framework features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.2 requires JDK 17+ and provides compatibility fixes and features for JDK 21; staying on 3.0.1 may cause runtime incompatibilities or missing features in a JDK 21 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features and potentially causing mismatches with Spring Boot 3.2 expectations.
